name: monata-env
description: Set up global Monata circuit and layout tool dependencies with pixi global.

interface.longDescription: Inspect a Monata workspace, build or reuse required local circuit-tool packages, install them into a pixi global environment named monata-env, expose tool commands, and validate ngspice, openvaf-r, and KLayout without installing Monata or techlibs.
defaultPrompt: Set up global Monata circuit tools with pixi global in the monata-env environment.
